title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 361.093 - Board to advise and recommend
text:
361.093.  Board to advise and recommend. — The state banking and savings and loan board shall advise the director of finance as to the proper administration of his office and the banking laws of this state and make recommendations to the general assembly as to changes in these laws.
(L. 1955 p. 263 § 7, A.L. 1967 p. 445, A.L. 2011 H.B. 464)
